# Strait UI — Full Reference

> Strait UI (@strait/ui) is a React + Tailwind v4 design system of 120+ accessible components built on Base UI primitives. Every component ships as its own tree-shakeable subpath export, is styled with semantic design tokens and class-variance-authority recipes, and exposes a named `*Props` type. Components render a polymorphic root via the Base UI `render` prop and tag their parts with `data-slot` attributes for styling and testing.

## Theming

All colours are semantic `oklch` CSS custom properties defined in
`@strait/ui/css`. Components reference token-backed Tailwind utilities
(`bg-primary`, `text-muted-foreground`, …), never raw colours, so theming is
a matter of redefining variables after importing the stylesheet.

### Set a custom brand (primary) colour

`--brand` is the single source of truth for the accent. Set it to any colour
format and the rest of the brand system derives automatically:

```css
@import "@strait/ui/css";

:root {
  --brand: #6366f1; /* hex, rgb(), or oklch() — that's the whole rebrand */
}
```

Setting `--brand` re-themes everything keyed off it:
- `--brand-foreground` — text on the solid brand fill; contrast-flips to
  near-black/white by the brand's lightness.
- `--brand-accent` — AA-legible text/border for the soft and outline brand
  variants on tinted surfaces (darkens in light mode, lightens in dark mode).
- `--chart-1`, `--sidebar-active-rail`, and the active-row tint follow too.

The same value is used in light and dark mode. Every derived token is an
ordinary custom property, so any of them can still be overridden individually.
Note: `--primary` is warm ink (default buttons), distinct from `--brand`.

### Dark mode

Dark mode is a `.dark` class on (or above) the themed element — typically
`<html>`. Tokens cascade, so toggling the class re-themes every component;
`next-themes` is the recommended wiring.

## Actions

### Button

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/button";`

The primary interactive control for actions and navigation.

Exports: `Button`, `ButtonProps`, `buttonVariants`

Props (`ButtonProps`):
Extends: `ButtonPrimitive.Props`, `VariantProps<typeof buttonVariants>`

Variants:
- `variant`: `default`, `secondary`, `outline`, `brand-solid`, `brand`, `brand-outline`, `destructive-solid`, `destructive`, `destructive-outline`, `success-solid`, `success`, `success-outline`, `warning-solid`, `warning`, `warning-outline`, `info-solid`, `info`, `info-outline`, `secondary-outline`, `invert-solid`, `invert`, `invert-outline`, `ghost`, `link` (default: `default`)
- `size`: `default`, `xs`, `sm`, `lg`, `xl`, `icon`, `icon-xs`, `icon-sm`, `icon-lg`, `icon-xl` (default: `default`)

Data slots: `button`

### Button Group

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/button-group";`

A toolbar-style container that fuses a set of related controls into a single visual unit.

Exports: `ButtonGroup`, `ButtonGroupProps`, `ButtonGroupSeparator`, `ButtonGroupText`, `buttonGroupVariants`

Props (`ButtonGroupProps`):
Extends: `React.ComponentProps<"div">`, `VariantProps<typeof buttonGroupVariants>`

Variants:
- `orientation`: `horizontal`, `vertical` (default: `horizontal`)

Data slots: `button-group`, `button-group-separator`

### Copy Button

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/copy-button";`

Icon button that copies a string to the clipboard and shows a transient checkmark as confirmation.

Exports: `CopyButton`, `CopyButtonProps`

Props (`CopyButtonProps`):
Extends: `React.ComponentProps<typeof Button>`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `text` | `string` | yes |  | The string written to the clipboard when the button is pressed. |
| `timeout` | `number` |  | `1500` | How long, in ms, the "copied" state persists before reverting. |
| `onCopied` | `(text: string) => void` |  |  | Called after a successful copy, useful for analytics or toasts. |

Data slots: `copy-button`

### Kbd

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/kbd";`

Renders a single keyboard key badge using the semantic `<kbd>` element.

Exports: `Kbd`, `KbdGroup`, `KbdProps`, `kbdVariants`

Props (`KbdProps`):
Extends: `React.ComponentProps<"kbd">`, `VariantProps<typeof kbdVariants>`

Variants:
- `size`: `sm`, `default`, `lg` (default: `default`)

Data slots: `kbd`, `kbd-group`, `tooltip-content`

### Toggle

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/toggle";`

A two-state button that toggles between pressed and unpressed.

Exports: `Toggle`, `ToggleProps`, `toggleVariants`

Props (`ToggleProps`):
Extends: `TogglePrimitive.Props`, `VariantProps<typeof toggleVariants>`

Variants:
- `emphasis`: `default`, `outline` (default: `default`)
- `size`: `xs`, `sm`, `default`, `lg`, `xl` (default: `default`)
- `variant`: `default`, `destructive`, `success`, `info`, `warning` (default: `default`)

Data slots: `toggle`

### Toggle Group

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/toggle-group";`

A managed group of ToggleGroupItem controls, handling single or multiple selection and keyboard navigation.

Exports: `ToggleGroup`, `ToggleGroupItem`, `ToggleGroupProps`

Props (`ToggleGroupProps`):
Extends: `ToggleGroupPrimitive.Props`, `VariantProps<typeof toggleVariants>`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `spacing` | `number` |  | `0` | Pixel gap between items, passed as `--gap` CSS custom property. When `0` (default), items are fused edge-to-edge with shared borders collapsed. |
| `orientation` | `"horizontal" \| "vertical"` |  | `"horizontal"` | Layout direction of the group. - `"horizontal"` — items are arranged in a row (default). - `"vertical"` — items are stacked in a column. Note: `aria-orientation` is suppressed because `role="group"` does not permit that attribute. |

Data slots: `toggle-group`, `toggle-group-item`

## Forms

### Autocomplete

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/autocomplete";`

Optional arrow that visually connects the popup to its anchor.

Exports: `Autocomplete`, `AutocompleteArrow`, `AutocompleteBackdrop`, `AutocompleteClear`, `AutocompleteCollection`, `AutocompleteContent`, `AutocompleteContentProps`, `AutocompleteEmpty`, `AutocompleteGroup`, `AutocompleteGroupLabel`, `AutocompleteInput`, `AutocompleteItem`, `AutocompleteList`, `AutocompletePortal`, `AutocompletePositioner`, `AutocompleteProps`, `AutocompleteRow`, `AutocompleteSeparator`, `AutocompleteStatus`, `AutocompleteTrigger`, `AutocompleteValue`

Props (`AutocompleteContentProps`):
Extends: `React.ComponentProps<typeof AutocompletePrimitive.Popup>`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `align` | `AutocompletePrimitive.Positioner.Props["align"]` |  | `"start"` | Alignment of the popup against its anchor (default `"start"`). |
| `alignOffset` | `AutocompletePrimitive.Positioner.Props["alignOffset"]` |  | `0` | Offset in pixels along the alignment axis (default `0`). |
| `anchor` | `AutocompletePrimitive.Positioner.Props["anchor"]` |  |  | Custom anchor element to position against instead of the input. |
| `showBackdrop` | `boolean` |  | `false` | Render an AutocompleteBackdrop behind the popup. |
| `side` | `AutocompletePrimitive.Positioner.Props["side"]` |  | `"bottom"` | Preferred side to place the popup (default `"bottom"`). |
| `sideOffset` | `AutocompletePrimitive.Positioner.Props["sideOffset"]` |  | `4` | Gap in pixels between the popup and its anchor (default `4`). |

Props (`AutocompleteProps`):
Extends: `React.ComponentProps< typeof AutocompletePrimitive.Root >`

Variants:
- `size`: `sm`, `default`, `lg` (default: `default`)

Data slots: `autocomplete-arrow`, `autocomplete-backdrop`, `autocomplete-clear`, `autocomplete-collection`, `autocomplete-empty`, `autocomplete-group`, `autocomplete-group-label`, `autocomplete-input`, `autocomplete-item`, `autocomplete-list`, `autocomplete-popup`, `autocomplete-portal`, `autocomplete-positioner`, `autocomplete-row`, `autocomplete-separator`, `autocomplete-status`, `autocomplete-trigger`, `autocomplete-value`

### Calendar

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/calendar";`

A styled date-picker calendar built on top of `react-day-picker`'s `DayPicker`.

Exports: `Calendar`, `CalendarDayButton`, `CalendarProps`

Props (`CalendarProps`):
Extends: `React.ComponentProps<typeof DayPicker>`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `buttonVariant` | `React.ComponentProps<typeof Button>["variant"]` |  | `"ghost"` | Button `variant` applied to the previous/next navigation buttons. Defaults to `"ghost"`. |

Data slots: `calendar`

Heavy dependencies: `react-day-picker`

### Checkbox

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/checkbox";`

A binary toggle control that indicates a checked or unchecked state.

Exports: `Checkbox`, `CheckboxProps`, `checkboxVariants`

Props (`CheckboxProps`):
Extends: `Omit<CheckboxPrimitive.Root.Props, "size">`, `VariantProps<typeof checkboxVariants>`

Variants:
- `size`: `sm`, `default`, `lg` (default: `default`)
- `variant`: `default`, `destructive` (default: `default`)

Data slots: `checkbox`, `checkbox-indicator`

### Date Selector

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/date-selector";`

A compact date filter that selects by day, month, quarter, half-year, or year with `is` / `before` / `after` / `between` operators. Reorders into a popover or dialog by wrapping it; the day view reuses Calendar and the coarser periods render their own grids.

Exports: `DEFAULT_DATE_SELECTOR_I18N`, `DateSelector`, `DateSelectorFilterType`, `DateSelectorI18nConfig`, `DateSelectorPeriodType`, `DateSelectorProps`, `DateSelectorRangePoint`, `DateSelectorValue`, `formatDateValue`, `useDateSelector`, `useDateSelectorContext`

Props (`DateSelectorProps`):

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `allowRange` | `boolean` |  | `true` | When `true` (default), enables the `between` range operator. |
| `baseYear` | `number` |  |  | Centre year for the generated year list. Defaults to the current year. |
| `className` | `string` |  |  | Additional classes for the root element. |
| `dayDateFormat` | `string` |  | `"MM/dd/yyyy"` | `date-fns` format used to render and parse day values. |
| `dayDateFormats` | `string[]` |  |  | Extra `date-fns` formats accepted when parsing typed input. |
| `defaultFilterType` | `DateSelectorFilterType` |  | `"is"` | The operator selected on first render. Defaults to `"is"`. |
| `defaultPeriodType` | `DateSelectorPeriodType` |  | `"day"` | The period selected on first render. Defaults to `"day"`. |
| `i18n` | `Partial<DateSelectorI18nConfig>` |  |  | Partial i18n overrides merged over the English defaults. |
| `inputHint` | `string` |  |  | When set, the input becomes editable and shows this hint while focused. |
| `label` | `string` |  |  | Optional heading rendered beside the operator tabs. |
| `maxYear` | `number` |  | `2026` | Upper bound (inclusive) of the year list. |
| `minYear` | `number` |  | `2015` | Lower bound (inclusive) of the year list. |
| `onChange` | `(value: DateSelectorValue) => void` |  |  | Called whenever the selection changes. |
| `periodTypes` | `DateSelectorPeriodType[]` |  |  | Restricts which period tabs are shown, in order. |
| `presetMode` | `DateSelectorFilterType` |  |  | Locks the operator to a fixed value and disables the operator tabs. |
| `showInput` | `boolean` |  | `true` | When `true` (default), renders the text input above the picker. |
| `showTwoMonths` | `boolean` |  | `true` | When `true` (default), the day view shows two months on desktop. |
| `value` | `DateSelectorValue` |  |  | The controlled selection. |
| `weekStartsOn` | `0 \| 1 \| 2 \| 3 \| 4 \| 5 \| 6` |  |  | First day of the week (0 = Sunday … 6 = Saturday). |
| `yearRange` | `number` |  | `10` | Number of years listed when `minYear`/`maxYear` are not set. |

Data slots: `date-selector`, `date-selector-days`, `date-selector-input`, `date-selector-label`, `date-selector-operators`, `date-selector-periods`

Heavy dependencies: `react-day-picker`

### Field

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/field";`

Single form field: associates a label, control, description, and error.

Exports: `Field`, `FieldContent`, `FieldDescription`, `FieldError`, `FieldGroup`, `FieldLabel`, `FieldLegend`, `FieldProps`, `FieldSeparator`, `FieldSet`, `FieldTitle`

Props (`FieldProps`):
Extends: `React.ComponentProps<"div">`, `VariantProps<typeof fieldVariants>`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `size` | `"sm" \| "default" \| "lg"` |  | `"default"` | Spacing size that cascades to sub-parts via `group-data-[size=…]/field` selectors. |

Variants:
- `orientation`: `vertical`, `horizontal`, `responsive` (default: `vertical`)

Data slots: `field`, `field-content`, `field-description`, `field-error`, `field-group`, `field-label`, `field-legend`, `field-separator`, `field-separator-content`, `field-set`, `field-title`

### FileUpload

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/file-upload";`

A drag-and-drop file upload zone with a browse button and a file list, built on the headless useFileUpload hook and native File APIs.

Exports: `FileMetadata`, `FileUpload`, `FileUploadActions`, `FileUploadDropzone`, `FileUploadDropzoneProps`, `FileUploadItem`, `FileUploadItemProps`, `FileUploadList`, `FileUploadListProps`, `FileUploadOptions`, `FileUploadProps`, `FileUploadSize`, `FileUploadState`, `FileWithPreview`, `fileUploadVariants`, `formatBytes`, `useFileUpload`

Props (`FileUploadDropzoneProps`):
Extends: `React.ComponentProps<"div">`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `dragging` | `boolean` |  | `false` | Whether a drag is currently hovering — toggles the active styling. |
| `size` | `FileUploadSize` |  | `"default"` | Density of the dropzone. |

Props (`FileUploadItemProps`):

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `className` | `string` |  |  | Additional class names applied to the list item element. |
| `file` | `FileWithPreview` | yes |  | The tracked file to display. |
| `onRemove` | `() => void` |  |  | Called when the user clicks the remove button. |

Props (`FileUploadListProps`):
Extends: `React.ComponentProps<"ul">`

Props (`FileUploadProps`):

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `accept` | `string` |  |  | Accepted MIME types and/or extensions as a comma-separated string (e.g. `"image/*,.pdf"`). When omitted every type is accepted. |
| `className` | `string` |  |  | Additional class names applied to the outer wrapper. |
| `defaultFiles` | `FileMetadata[]` |  |  | Files to seed the list with on mount. |
| `disabled` | `boolean` |  | `false` | Disables the dropzone and browse button. |
| `label` | `React.ReactNode` |  | `"Drag & drop files here, or"` | Prompt shown inside the dropzone above the browse button. |
| `maxFiles` | `number` |  |  | Maximum number of files (only enforced when `multiple`). |
| `maxSize` | `number` |  |  | Maximum size per file in bytes. |
| `multiple` | `boolean` |  | `false` | Allow selecting and dropping multiple files. |
| `onError` | `(errors: string[]) => void` |  |  | Called with human-readable messages when files are rejected. |
| `onValueChange` | `(files: FileWithPreview[]) => void` |  |  | Called with the full list whenever it changes. |
| `size` | `FileUploadSize` |  | `"default"` | Density of the dropzone. |

Variants:
- `size`: `sm`, `default`, `lg` (default: `default`)

Data slots: `file-upload`, `file-upload-dropzone`, `file-upload-error`, `file-upload-item`, `file-upload-list`

### Form

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/form";`

Root provider for a `@tanstack/react-form` managed form.

Exports: `Form`, `FormControl`, `FormDescription`, `FormField`, `FormFieldProps`, `FormItem`, `FormLabel`, `FormMessage`, `FormProps`, `useFormField`

Props (`FormFieldProps`):
Extends: `Omit<TanStackFieldProps, "form" | "name" | "children">`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | Dot-path of the field within the form's values. |
| `render` | `(api: FormFieldRenderApi) => React.ReactNode` |  |  | Render the control. Receives the TanStack `field` API. |
| `children` | `React.ReactNode \| ((api: FormFieldRenderApi) => React.ReactNode)` |  |  | Alternative to `render`: a node or a render function. |

Props (`FormProps`):

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `form` | `AnyFormApi` | yes |  | The instance returned by `useForm()`. |
| `children` | `React.ReactNode` | yes |  | Form content — typically a `<form>` element containing FormFields. |

Data slots: `form-description`, `form-item`, `form-label`, `form-message`

### Input

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/input";`

A single-line text control for user input.

Exports: `Input`, `InputProps`, `inputVariants`

Props (`InputProps`):
Extends: `Omit<React.ComponentProps<"input">, "size">`, `VariantProps<typeof inputVariants>`

Variants:
- `size`: `sm`, `default`, `lg` (default: `default`)

Data slots: `input`

### Input Group

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/input-group";`

A composite control that visually merges an input (or textarea) with leading/trailing addons, icons, buttons, or labels into a single bordered group.

Exports: `InputGroup`, `InputGroupAddon`, `InputGroupButton`, `InputGroupInput`, `InputGroupProps`, `InputGroupText`, `InputGroupTextarea`

Props (`InputGroupProps`):
Extends: `React.ComponentProps<"div">`

Variants:
- `align`: `inline-start`, `inline-end`, `block-start`, `block-end` (default: `inline-start`)

Data slots: `input-group`, `input-group-addon`, `input-group-control`

### Label

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/label";`

Accessible label for a form control.

Exports: `Label`, `LabelProps`

Props (`LabelProps`):
Extends: `React.ComponentProps<"label">`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `size` | `"sm" \| "default" \| "lg"` |  | `"default"` | Text size of the label. - `sm` — `text-xs` - `default` — `text-sm` (unchanged) - `lg` — `text-base` |
| `required` | `boolean` |  | `false` | When `true`, appends an `aria-hidden` red asterisk after the label text to signal that the associated control is required. |

Data slots: `label`

### MultiSelect

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/multiselect";`

A multi-value combobox that lets users select (and optionally create) multiple options from a searchable dropdown list.

Exports: `MultipleSelector (default)`, `MultipleSelectorProps`, `MultipleSelectorRef`, `MultipleSelectorSize`, `Option`, `useDebounce`

Props (`MultipleSelectorProps`):

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `value` | `Option[]` |  |  | Controlled selection; keep in sync via onChange. |
| `defaultOptions` | `Option[]` |  |  | Initial options shown in the dropdown before any search. |
| `options` | `Option[]` |  |  | manually controlled options |
| `placeholder` | `string` |  |  | Input placeholder text shown when no options are selected. |
| `loadingIndicator` | `React.ReactNode` |  |  | Loading component. |
| `emptyIndicator` | `React.ReactNode` |  |  | Empty component. |
| `delay` | `number` |  |  | Debounce time for async search. Only work with `onSearch`. |
| `triggerSearchOnFocus` | `boolean` |  | `false` | Only work with `onSearch` prop. Trigger search when `onFocus`. For example, when user click on the input, it will trigger the search to get initial options. |
| `onSearch` | `(value: string) => Promise<Option[]>` |  |  | async search |
| `onSearchSync` | `(value: string) => Option[]` |  |  | sync search. This search will not showing loadingIndicator. The rest props are the same as async search. i.e.: creatable, groupBy, delay. |
| `onChange` | `(options: Option[]) => void` |  |  | Called with the full updated selection whenever options are added or removed. |
| `maxSelected` | `number` |  | `Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER` | Limit the maximum number of selected options. |
| `onMaxSelected` | `(maxLimit: number) => void` |  |  | When the number of selected options exceeds the limit, the onMaxSelected will be called. |
| `showPlaceholderWhenSelected` | `boolean` |  | `true` | Show the placeholder when there are options selected. |
| `disabled` | `boolean` |  |  | Disables the control; pointer events are blocked and opacity is reduced. |
| `groupBy` | `string` |  |  | Group the options base on provided key. |
| `className` | `string` |  |  | Extra classes merged onto the outer input wrapper element. |
| `badgeClassName` | `string` |  |  | Extra classes merged onto each selected-option badge chip. |
| `selectFirstItem` | `boolean` |  | `true` | First item selected is a default behavior by cmdk. That is why the default is true. This is a workaround solution by add a dummy item. |
| `creatable` | `boolean` |  | `false` | Allow user to create option when there is no option matched. |
| `commandProps` | `React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof Command>` |  |  | Props of `Command` |
| `inputProps` | `Omit< React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof CommandPrimitive.Input>, "value" \| "placeholder" \| "disabled" >` |  |  | Props of `CommandInput` |
| `showClearAllButton` | `boolean` |  | `true` | show the clear all button. |
| `size` | `MultipleSelectorSize` |  | `"default"` | Size axis controlling control height and chip size. |

Data slots: `empty`

### Native Select

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/native-select";`

A styled wrapper around the native `<select>` element.

Exports: `NativeSelect`, `NativeSelectOptGroup`, `NativeSelectOption`, `NativeSelectProps`

Props (`NativeSelectProps`):
Extends: `Omit<React.ComponentProps<"select">, "size">`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `size` | `"sm" \| "default" \| "lg"` |  | `"default"` | Height preset for the select control. - `sm` — 28 px tall, tighter border radius. - `default` — 32 px tall (unchanged default). - `lg` — 36 px tall, slightly larger text. |

Data slots: `native-select`, `native-select-icon`, `native-select-optgroup`, `native-select-option`, `native-select-wrapper`

### Radio Group

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/radio-group";`

A group of mutually exclusive radio options.

Exports: `RadioGroup`, `RadioGroupItem`, `RadioGroupProps`

Props (`RadioGroupProps`):
Extends: `RadioGroupPrimitive.Props`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `size` | `"sm" \| "default" \| "lg"` |  | `"default"` | Size of each radio circle. Cascades to all nested RadioGroupItems via `group-data-[size=…]/radio-group` selectors. |

Data slots: `radio-group`, `radio-group-indicator`, `radio-group-item`

### Rating

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/rating";`

A star rating input that supports controlled, uncontrolled, read-only, and disabled modes.

Exports: `Rating`, `RatingProps`, `ratingVariants`

Props (`RatingProps`):
Extends: `VariantProps<typeof ratingVariants>`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `aria-label` | `string` |  |  | Accessible name for the root element (`role="radiogroup"` or `role="img"`). |
| `className` | `string` |  |  | Additional CSS classes forwarded to the root element. |
| `defaultValue` | `number` |  | `0` | Initial rating value for uncontrolled usage. |
| `disabled` | `boolean` |  | `false` | When `true` the component is non-interactive and visually dimmed. |
| `max` | `number` |  | `5` | Total number of stars rendered. |
| `onValueChange` | `(value: number) => void` |  |  | Callback fired whenever the selected rating changes. Receives the newly selected star index (1‥max). |
| `readOnly` | `boolean` |  | `false` | When `true` the component renders as a non-interactive display element with `role="img"`. |
| `value` | `number` |  |  | Controlled current rating value. When provided the component is fully controlled; pair with `onValueChange` to track changes. |

Variants:
- `size`: `sm`, `default`, `lg` (default: `default`)

Data slots: `rating`, `rating-star`

### Secret Input

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/secret-input";`

A controlled text input purpose-built for secrets and API keys.

Exports: `SecretInput`, `SecretInputProps`

Props (`SecretInputProps`):
Extends: `Omit<React.ComponentProps<typeof Input>, "type">`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `value` | `string` | yes |  | The controlled secret value written to the input. |
| `revealable` | `boolean` |  | `true` | When `true` (default), a ghost icon button on the trailing edge lets the user flip between masked and plain-text display. |
| `copyable` | `boolean` |  | `true` | When `true` (default), a CopyButton is rendered on the trailing edge so the user can copy the secret without revealing it. |

Data slots: `secret-input`

### Select

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/select";`

Accessible single-value dropdown built on Base UI's `Select` primitive.

Exports: `Select`, `SelectContent`, `SelectGroup`, `SelectItem`, `SelectLabel`, `SelectScrollDownButton`, `SelectScrollUpButton`, `SelectSeparator`, `SelectSize`, `SelectTrigger`, `SelectTriggerProps`, `SelectValue`

Props (`SelectTriggerProps`):
Extends: `SelectPrimitive.Trigger.Props`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `size` | `SelectSize` |  |  | Height / border-radius scale of the trigger button. |

Data slots: `select-content`, `select-group`, `select-item`, `select-label`, `select-scroll-down-button`, `select-scroll-up-button`, `select-separator`, `select-trigger`, `select-value`

### Select Native

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/select-native";`

Styled wrapper around the browser's native `<select>` element.

Exports: `SelectNative`, `SelectNativeProps`

Props (`SelectNativeProps`):
Extends: `React.ComponentProps<"select">`

Data slots: `select-native`

### Slider

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/slider";`

A range-input control for selecting a numeric value (or range of values) by dragging one or more thumbs along a track.

Exports: `Slider`, `SliderProps`, `sliderRangeVariants`, `sliderThumbVariants`, `sliderTrackVariants`

Props (`SliderProps`):
Extends: `SliderPrimitive.Root.Props`, `VariantProps<typeof sliderTrackVariants>`, `VariantProps<typeof sliderRangeVariants>`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `aria-label` | `string` |  |  | Accessible name forwarded to every thumb input. Omit when the slider is associated with a `<FieldLabel>` via Base UI's `Field` context. |

Variants:
- `size`: `sm`, `default`, `lg` (default: `default`)

Data slots: `slider`, `slider-range`, `slider-thumb`, `slider-track`

### Switch

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/switch";`

A toggle control that switches between on and off states.

Exports: `Switch`, `SwitchProps`

Props (`SwitchProps`):
Extends: `SwitchPrimitive.Root.Props`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `size` | `"sm" \| "default" \| "lg"` |  | `"default"` | Physical size of the switch track and thumb. |
| `intent` | `"default" \| "destructive"` |  | `"default"` | Colour intent of the checked track. - `"default"` — uses the `primary` token (unchanged from before). - `"destructive"` — uses `bg-destructive` when checked. |

Data slots: `switch`, `switch-thumb`

### Textarea

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/textarea";`

A multi-line text control for longer user input.

Exports: `Textarea`, `TextareaProps`, `textareaVariants`

Props (`TextareaProps`):
Extends: `React.ComponentProps<"textarea">`, `VariantProps<typeof textareaVariants>`

Variants:
- `size`: `sm`, `default`, `lg` (default: `default`)
- `resize`: `none`, `vertical`, `auto` (default: `vertical`)

Data slots: `textarea`

## Data Display

### Activity Feed

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/activity-feed";`

A presentational, scrollable list of timestamped activity entries with status dots and relative times.

Exports: `ActivityFeed`, `ActivityFeedProps`, `ActivityItem`

Props (`ActivityFeedProps`):

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `items` | `ActivityItem[]` | yes |  | Ordered list of activity entries to display. |
| `height` | `number \| string` |  | `320` | Height of the scrollable viewport. Accepts any CSS value (`"320px"`, `"100%"`, …) or a bare number treated as pixels. Defaults to `320`. |
| `emptyState` | `React.ReactNode` |  |  | Node rendered when `items` is empty. Defaults to a centred muted "No activity yet" message. |
| `renderItem` | `(item: ActivityItem) => React.ReactNode` |  |  | Escape hatch for full row customisation. When provided, it replaces the default row renderer entirely; `data-slot="activity-feed-item"` is still your responsibility inside the returned node. |
| `className` | `string` |  |  | Extra classes merged onto the root `ScrollArea`. |

Data slots: `activity-feed`, `activity-feed-item`

### AspectRatio

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/aspect-ratio";`

Container that enforces a fixed width-to-height ratio on its content.

Exports: `AspectRatio`, `AspectRatioProps`

Props (`AspectRatioProps`):
Extends: `React.ComponentProps<"div">`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `ratio` | `number` | yes |  | Width-to-height ratio as a plain number (e.g. `16 / 9`, `4 / 3`, `1`). Passed to the `--ratio` CSS custom property consumed by `aspect-(--ratio)`. |

Data slots: `aspect-ratio`

### Avatar

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/avatar";`

Rounded user-identity image with automatic fallback text.

Exports: `Avatar`, `AvatarBadge`, `AvatarFallback`, `AvatarGroup`, `AvatarGroupCount`, `AvatarImage`, `AvatarProps`, `avatarBadgeVariants`

Props (`AvatarProps`):
Extends: `AvatarPrimitive.Root.Props`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `size` | `"xs" \| "default" \| "sm" \| "lg" \| "xl"` |  | `"default"` | Size preset that cascades to every sub-part via `data-size`. Controls the avatar's width/height: `"xs"` (20px) · `"sm"` (24px) · `"default"` (32px) · `"lg"` (40px) · `"xl"` (48px). |

Variants:
- `status`: `online`, `busy`, `away`, `offline`

Data slots: `avatar`, `avatar-badge`, `avatar-fallback`, `avatar-group`, `avatar-group-count`, `avatar-image`

### Badge

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/badge";`

Small status label used to categorise, tag, or annotate content.

Exports: `Badge`, `BadgeProps`, `badgeVariants`

Props (`BadgeProps`):
Extends: `useRender.ComponentProps<"span">`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `dismissible` | `boolean` |  |  | When `true`, appends a dismiss `<button>` containing Cancel01Icon. |
| `dot` | `boolean` |  |  | When `true`, prepends a small leading dot before children (and before `iconLeft`). The dot colour tracks `currentColor` (`bg-current`) so it inherits the variant's text colour automatically. |
| `dotClassName` | `string` |  |  | Extra Tailwind classes merged onto the leading dot `<span>`. |
| `iconLeft` | `IconSvgElement` |  |  | Icon rendered immediately before children. |
| `iconRight` | `IconSvgElement` |  |  | Icon rendered immediately after children. |
| `mono` | `boolean` |  |  | When `true`, applies `font-mono uppercase tracking-wide` for monospaced label styling — useful for version numbers, codes, or IDs. |
| `onDismiss` | `() => void` |  |  | Called when the dismiss button is clicked. |
| `radius` | `VariantProps<typeof badgeVariants>["radius"]` |  |  | Corner radius preset applied via badgeVariants. `"lg"` (default, rounded-lg) · `"pill"` (full-pill opt-in) · `"md"` (rounded-md) · `"sm"` (subtle 4 px). Use `"md"` for tag-style chips inside data tables; use `"pill"` for fully circular badges. |
| `size` | `VariantProps<typeof badgeVariants>["size"]` |  |  | Size preset applied via badgeVariants. `"xs"` through `"xl"`; controls height, padding, and font size. |
| `variant` | `VariantProps<typeof badgeVariants>["variant"]` |  |  | Colour and emphasis style applied via badgeVariants. Includes solid fills, tinted `*-light` fills, bordered `*-outline` variants, `ghost`, and `link`. |

Variants:
- `radius`: `lg`, `pill`, `md`, `sm` (default: `lg`)
- `variant`: `default`, `outline`, `secondary`, `info`, `success`, `warning`, `destructive`, `invert`, `primary-light`, `warning-light`, `success-light`, `info-light`, `destructive-light`, `invert-light`, `secondary-light`, `primary-outline`, `warning-outline`, `success-outline`, `info-outline`, `destructive-outline`, `invert-outline`, `secondary-outline`, `ghost`, `link` (default: `default`)
- `size`: `xs`, `sm`, `default`, `lg`, `xl` (default: `default`)

Data slots: `badge`, `badge-dismiss`, `badge-dot`

### Bar List

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/bar-list";`

A horizontal ranked bar list — labels overlaid on value-proportional bars, with the formatted value in a trailing column.

Exports: `BarList`, `BarListItem`, `BarListProps`

Props (`BarListProps`):
Extends: `React.ComponentProps<"div">`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `data` | `BarListItem<T>[]` | yes | `[]` | Rows to render. |
| `onValueChange` | `(payload: BarListItem<T>) => void` |  |  | Makes rows interactive and fires with the clicked row. |
| `sortOrder` | `"ascending" \| "descending" \| "none"` |  | `"descending"` | Sort direction by value. Defaults to `"descending"`. |
| `valueFormatter` | `(value: number) => string` |  | `(value) => value.toString()` | Formats the trailing value. |

Data slots: `bar-list`

### Bulk Action Bar

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/bulk-action-bar";`

Floating toolbar that appears when one or more table / list rows are selected, exposing bulk actions and a way to clear the selection.

Exports: `BulkAction`, `BulkActionBar`, `BulkActionBarProps`

Props (`BulkActionBarProps`):

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `selectedCount` | `number` | yes |  | Number of currently-selected items, shown as `"N selected"`. |
| `onClearSelection` | `() => void` | yes |  | Called when the user presses the clear-selection (×) button. |
| `actions` | `BulkAction[]` | yes |  | Action buttons rendered in the toolbar. |
| `position` | `"fixed" \| "static"` |  | `"static"` | Positioning strategy. |
| `className` | `string` |  |  | Additional class names merged onto the root element. |
| `children` | `React.ReactNode` |  |  | Extra content rendered between the selected-count label and the action buttons. Use this slot for supplementary controls (e.g. a "Select all" checkbox). |

Data slots: `bulk-action-bar`

### Card

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/card";`

A surface that groups related content and actions into a bordered container.

Exports: `Card`, `CardAction`, `CardContent`, `CardDescription`, `CardFooter`, `CardHeader`, `CardProps`, `CardTitle`, `cardVariants`

Props (`CardProps`):
Extends: `React.ComponentProps<"div">`, `CardVariantProps`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `size` | `"default" \| "sm" \| "lg"` |  | `"default"` | Spacing preset that cascades to all sub-parts via `data-size`. - `"sm"` — gap-3 / py-3; header/content `px-3`; footer `px-3 py-2`. - `"default"` — gap-4 / py-4; header/content `px-4`; footer `px-4 py-2.5`. - `"lg"` — gap-6 / py-6; header/content `px-6`; footer `px-6 py-3.5`. |

Variants:
- `variant`: `default`, `outline`, `ghost` (default: `default`)

Data slots: `card`, `card-action`, `card-content`, `card-description`, `card-footer`, `card-header`, `card-title`

### Carousel

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/carousel";`

Accessible, touch-friendly carousel built on Embla Carousel.

Exports: `Carousel`, `CarouselApi`, `CarouselContent`, `CarouselItem`, `CarouselNext`, `CarouselPrevious`, `CarouselProps`, `useCarousel`

Props (`CarouselProps`):

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `opts` | `CarouselOptions` |  |  | Embla options forwarded directly to `useEmblaCarousel`. |
| `plugins` | `CarouselPlugin` |  |  | Embla plugins (e.g. autoplay, wheel gestures). |
| `orientation` | `"horizontal" \| "vertical"` |  | `"horizontal"` | Scroll axis — `"horizontal"` (default) or `"vertical"`. |
| `setApi` | `(api: CarouselApi) => void` |  |  | Callback that receives the Embla API instance once it is ready. Use this to call imperative methods (e.g. `api.scrollTo(index)`). |

Data slots: `carousel`, `carousel-content`, `carousel-item`, `carousel-next`, `carousel-previous`

Heavy dependencies: `embla-carousel-react`

### Charts

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/charts";`

Config-driven multi-series area chart.

Exports: `AreaChart`, `AreaChartProps`, `BarChart`, `BarChartProps`, `DonutChart`, `LineChart`, `LineChartProps`, `PieChart`, `PieChartProps`

Props (`AreaChartProps`):
Extends: `BaseChartProps`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `areaProps` | `Partial<ComponentProps<typeof Area>>` |  |  | Props forwarded to the underlying recharts `<Area>`. |
| `chartProps` | `Omit< ComponentProps<typeof AreaChartPrimitive>, "data" \| "stackOffset" >` |  |  | Props forwarded to the underlying recharts `<AreaChart>`. |
| `connectNulls` | `boolean` |  | `false` | Join across null gaps instead of breaking the area. |
| `fillType` | `"gradient" \| "solid" \| "none"` |  | `"gradient"` | Fill treatment beneath each area. Defaults to `"gradient"`. |

Props (`BarChartProps`):
Extends: `BaseChartProps`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `barCategoryGap` | `number` |  | `5` | Gap between bar groups (categories) in pixels. |
| `barGap` | `number` |  |  | Gap between individual bars within a group in pixels. |
| `barProps` | `Partial<ComponentProps<typeof Bar>>` |  |  | Props forwarded to the underlying recharts `<Bar>`. |
| `barRadius` | `number` |  |  | Border-radius applied to the top corners of each bar. |
| `barSize` | `number` |  |  | Fixed width in pixels for each bar. |
| `chartProps` | `Omit< ComponentProps<typeof BarChartPrimitive>, "data" \| "stackOffset" >` |  |  | Props forwarded to the underlying recharts `<BarChart>`. |

Props (`LineChartProps`):
Extends: `BaseChartProps`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `chartProps` | `Omit< ComponentProps<typeof LineChartPrimitive>, "data" \| "stackOffset" >` |  |  | Props forwarded to the underlying recharts `<LineChart>`. |
| `connectNulls` | `boolean` |  | `false` | Join across null gaps instead of breaking the line. |
| `lineProps` | `Partial<LineProps>` |  |  | Props forwarded to the underlying recharts `<Line>`. |

Props (`PieChartProps`):
Extends: `Omit< BaseChartProps, | "showGridLines" | "showXAxis" | "showYAxis" | "xAxisProps" | "yAxisProps" | "displayEdgeLabelsOnly" | "legend" | "legendProps" >`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `chartProps` | `Omit< ComponentProps<typeof PieChartPrimitive>, "data" \| "stackOffset" >` |  |  | Props forwarded to the underlying recharts `<PieChart>`. |
| `label` | `string` |  |  | Centre label text for the donut variant. Defaults to the value sum. |
| `nameKey` | `string` |  |  | Data key used as the slice name (maps rows to `config` entries). |
| `pieProps` | `Omit<ComponentProps<typeof Pie>, "data" \| "dataKey" \| "name">` |  |  | Props forwarded to the underlying recharts `<Pie>`. |
| `showLabel` | `boolean` |  |  | Show the centre label (donut variant only). |
| `variant` | `"pie" \| "donut"` |  | `"pie"` | `"pie"` (solid) or `"donut"` (hollow centre). Defaults to `"pie"`. |

Data slots: `label`

Heavy dependencies: `recharts`

### Code Block

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/code-block";`

Read-only code display surface with Shiki-powered syntax highlighting, an optional language label, line numbers, and a clipboard copy button.

Exports: `CodeBlock`, `CodeBlockProps`, `codeBlockVariants`

Props (`CodeBlockProps`):
Extends: `VariantProps<typeof codeBlockVariants>`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `className` | `string` |  |  | Additional class names applied to the root element. |
| `code` | `string` | yes |  | The source code string to display. |
| `copyable` | `boolean` |  | `true` | When `true` (the default) a CopyButton appears in the top bar. Pass `false` to suppress it. |
| `language` | `string` |  |  | Language used both for the top-bar label and Shiki syntax highlighting (e.g. `"tsx"`, `"ruby"`, `"go"`, `"bash"`). Unknown languages fall back to plain text. Omit to render unhighlighted text. |
| `maxHeight` | `number \| string` |  |  | Constrains the code body height. Accepts any CSS `max-height` value (e.g. `400`, `"50vh"`). A numeric value is treated as pixels. |
| `showLineNumbers` | `boolean` |  | `false` | When `true`, a numbered gutter is rendered to the left of each line. |
| `wrap` | `boolean` |  | `false` | When `true`, long lines wrap and break at word boundaries instead of scrolling horizontally. |

Variants:
- `variant`: `default`, `dark`, `transparent` (default: `default`)

Data slots: `code-block`, `code-block-content`

Heavy dependencies: `shiki`

### Code Block Command

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/code-block-command";`

A package-manager command block with tabs for npm, pnpm, yarn, and bun, a copy button that copies the active manager's command, and persistent manager selection via `localStorage`.

Exports: `CodeBlockCommand`, `CodeBlockCommandProps`, `PackageManager`, `PackageManagerCommands`, `convertNpmCommand`

Props (`CodeBlockCommandProps`):

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `bun` | `string` |  |  | Explicit bun command — overrides the derived value when `npm` is also provided. |
| `className` | `string` |  |  | Extra classes merged onto the outermost element. |
| `npm` | `string` |  |  | The npm command (used as-is for the `npm` tab and as the derivation source). |
| `onCopySuccess` | `() => void` |  |  | Called after the active command has been written to the clipboard. |
| `pnpm` | `string` |  |  | Explicit pnpm command — overrides the derived value when `npm` is also provided. |
| `prompt` | `string` |  |  | An AI-assistant instruction shown in an extra "AI" tab. |
| `storageKey` | `string` |  | `"package-manager"` | `localStorage` key used to persist the user's package-manager preference. |
| `yarn` | `string` |  |  | Explicit yarn command — overrides the derived value when `npm` is also provided. |

Data slots: `code-block-command`

### Config Row

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/config-row";`

A single label/value row for settings panels, detail drawers, and info grids.

Exports: `ConfigRow`, `ConfigRowProps`

Props (`ConfigRowProps`):

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `icon` | `IconSvgElement` |  |  | Optional leading icon rendered at size 14 in `text-muted-foreground`. |
| `label` | `React.ReactNode` | yes |  | Muted label displayed on the left side of the row. |
| `value` | `React.ReactNode` |  |  | The value shown on the right side, rendered in `font-mono text-xs` by default. Ignored when `children` is provided. |
| `description` | `React.ReactNode` |  |  | Optional second muted line rendered below `label` in a smaller size. |
| `action` | `React.ReactNode` |  |  | Optional trailing action node (e.g. a CopyButton or Button) pinned to the far right of the row. |
| `className` | `string` |  |  | Additional classes merged onto the root `div` element. |
| `children` | `React.ReactNode` |  |  | When provided, used as the value content in place of the `value` prop. Rendered identically — wrapped in a `font-mono text-xs` span. |

Data slots: `config-row`

### DataGrid

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/data-grid";`

Root component for the DataGrid system.

Exports: `DataGrid`, `DataGridApiFetchParams`, `DataGridApiResponse`, `DataGridColumnFilter`, `DataGridColumnFilterProps`, `DataGridColumnHeader`, `DataGridColumnHeaderProps`, `DataGridColumnVisibility`, `DataGridContainer`, `DataGridContextProps`, `DataGridPagination`, `DataGridPaginationProps`, `DataGridProps`, `DataGridProvider`, `DataGridRequestParams`, `DataGridScrollArea`, `DataGridScrollAreaProps`, `DataGridSelectionBar`, `DataGridSelectionBarProps`, `DataGridTable`, `DataGridTableClassNames`, `DataGridTableDnd`, `DataGridTableDndRowHandle`, `DataGridTableDndRows`, `DataGridTableEmpty`, `DataGridTableFoot`, `DataGridTableFootRow`, `DataGridTableFootRowCell`, `DataGridTableHeadRowCellResize`, `DataGridTableLayout`, `DataGridTableLoader`, `DataGridTableRowActions`, `DataGridTableRowActionsProps`, `DataGridTableRowPin`, `DataGridTableRowSelect`, `DataGridTableRowSelectAll`, `DataGridTableVirtual`, `DataGridTableVirtualProps`, `DataGridTableVirtualScrollElements`, `DataGridTableVirtualizerOptions`, `getColumnHeaderLabel`, `useDataGrid`

Props (`DataGridColumnFilterProps`):

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `column` | `Column<TData, TValue>` |  |  | The TanStack Table column to filter. |
| `options` | `{ /** Display label. */ label: string; /** Filter value matched against `getFacetedUniqueValues`. */ value: string; /** Optional icon component. */ icon?: React.ComponentType<{ className?: string }>; }[]` | yes |  | List of filterable option values. |
| `title` | `string` |  |  | Display title for the trigger button and search input placeholder. |

Props (`DataGridColumnHeaderProps`):
Extends: `React.ComponentProps<"div">`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `column` | `Column<TData, TValue>` | yes |  | The TanStack Table column instance. |
| `filter` | `React.ReactNode` |  |  | Optional filter node rendered as the first item in the column dropdown. |
| `icon` | `React.ReactNode` |  |  | Optional icon rendered before the title. |
| `pinnable` | `boolean` |  |  | Whether pinning is supported (passed through; read from tableLayout). |
| `title` | `string` |  |  | Display title; falls back to `meta.headerTitle`, string header, or `column.id`. |
| `visibility` | `boolean` |  |  | Whether to include a Columns visibility submenu. Default `false`. |

Props (`DataGridContextProps`):

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `isLoading` | `boolean` | yes |  | Whether the grid is in a loading state. |
| `props` | `DataGridProps<TData>` | yes |  | The resolved merged props passed to DataGrid. |
| `recordCount` | `number` | yes |  | Total record count (drives pagination info and empty-state checks). |
| `table` | `Table<TData>` | yes |  | The TanStack Table instance. |

Props (`DataGridPaginationProps`):

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `className` | `string` |  |  | Extra class names on the root element. |
| `ellipsisText` | `string` |  |  | Ellipsis text. Default `"..."`. |
| `info` | `string` |  |  | Pagination info template string. Default `"{from} - {to} of {count}"`. |
| `infoSkeleton` | `React.ReactNode` |  |  | Skeleton shown for the info section while loading. |
| `more` | `boolean` |  |  | Whether to render grouped ellipsis page buttons. Default `false`. |
| `moreLimit` | `number` |  |  | Number of page buttons per group. Default `5`. |
| `nextPageLabel` | `string` |  |  | Aria-label for the next-page button. Default `"Go to next page"`. |
| `previousPageLabel` | `string` |  |  | Aria-label for the previous-page button. Default `"Go to previous page"`. |
| `rowsPerPageLabel` | `string` |  |  | Label for the rows-per-page control. Default `"Rows per page"`. |
| `sizes` | `number[]` |  |  | Available page-size options. Default `[5, 10, 25, 50, 100]`. |
| `sizesDescription` | `string` |  |  | Label after the page-size select. Default `"per page"`. |
| `sizesInfo` | `string` |  |  | Extra info shown next to the sizes select. |
| `sizesLabel` | `string` |  |  | Label before the page-size select. Default `"Show"`. |
| `sizesSkeleton` | `React.ReactNode` |  |  | Skeleton shown for the sizes section while loading. |

Props (`DataGridProps`):

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `allRowsLoadedMessage` | `React.ReactNode \| string` |  |  | Message shown in the virtual infinite-scroll footer once all rows are loaded. |
| `children` | `React.ReactNode` |  |  | Content rendered inside the provider (all sub-components). |
| `className` | `string` |  |  | Extra class names on the outermost container (when using DataGridContainer). |
| `emptyMessage` | `React.ReactNode \| string` |  |  | Message shown in the empty-state row when there is no data. |
| `fetchingMoreMessage` | `React.ReactNode \| string` |  |  | Message shown in the virtual infinite-scroll footer while fetching more rows. |
| `loading` | `boolean` |  |  | When `true`, the grid is in a loading state. |
| `loadingMessage` | `React.ReactNode \| string` |  |  | Custom content shown in the spinner overlay. |
| `loadingMode` | `"skeleton" \| "spinner"` |  |  | Controls whether loading renders skeleton rows (`"skeleton"`) or a centred spinner (`"spinner"`). |
| `onRowClick` | `(row: TData) => void` |  |  | Called when a body row is clicked. |
| `recordCount` | `number` | yes |  | Total number of records — used by pagination and empty-state checks. |
| `table` | `Table<TData>` |  |  | The TanStack Table instance created by `useReactTable`. |
| `tableClassNames` | `DataGridTableClassNames` |  |  | Class-name overrides for individual structural elements. |
| `tableLayout` | `DataGridTableLayout` |  |  | Feature-flag bag that controls layout and interactive column/row features. |

Props (`DataGridScrollAreaProps`):
Extends: `Omit< ScrollAreaPrimitive.Root.Props, "children" >`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `children` | `React.ReactNode` | yes |  | Content rendered inside the scroll area. |
| `orientation` | `"horizontal" \| "vertical" \| "both"` |  | `"both"` | Which scroll axes to enable. Default `"both"`. |

Props (`DataGridSelectionBarProps`):

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `actions` | `BulkAction[]` | yes |  | Bulk action buttons rendered inside the toolbar. Each action's `onClick` is responsible for resetting selection if desired — the clear (×) button handles selection reset automatically. |
| `className` | `string` |  |  | Additional class names forwarded to BulkActionBar. |
| `children` | `React.ReactNode` |  |  | Extra content rendered between the count label and the action buttons (forwarded to BulkActionBar's `children` slot). |

Props (`DataGridTableRowActionsProps`):

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `row` | `Row<TData>` | yes |  | The TanStack row whose actions are being exposed. Passed through to children via the `data-row-id` attribute for test selectors; the row itself is available to consumers via the surrounding closure. |
| `children` | `React.ReactNode` | yes |  | DropdownMenuItem children rendered inside the menu. Compose `DropdownMenuItem`, `DropdownMenuSeparator`, `DropdownMenuLabel`, etc. |
| `label` | `string` |  | `"Row actions"` | Accessible label for the trigger button. Defaults to `"Row actions"`. |
| `className` | `string` |  |  | Additional class names merged onto the trigger button. |

Props (`DataGridTableVirtualProps`):

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `estimateSize` | `number` |  |  | Estimated row height in px. Default `48`. |
| `fetchingMore` | `boolean` |  | `false` | Whether a fetch is in progress (disables duplicate fetches). Default `false`. |
| `fetchMoreOffset` | `number` |  | `0` | Number of items from the end to trigger `onFetchMore`. Default `0`. |
| `footerContent` | `React.ReactNode` |  |  | Footer content. |
| `height` | `number \| string` |  |  | Fixed height for a self-contained scroll container. |
| `moreAvailable` | `boolean` |  |  | `false` = all loaded; `true` / `undefined` = more available. |
| `onFetchMore` | `() => void` |  |  | If provided, enables infinite scroll mode. |
| `overscan` | `number` |  | `10` | Number of rows to render outside the visible area. Default `10`. |
| `renderHeader` | `boolean` |  | `true` | Whether to render the header. Default `true`. |
| `virtualizerOptions` | `DataGridTableVirtualizerOptions<TData>` |  |  | Advanced virtualizer options. |

Variants:
- `dense`: `true`, `false` (default: `false`)

Data slots: `data-grid`, `data-grid-column-header`, `data-grid-pagination`, `data-grid-row-actions`, `data-grid-row-pin`, `data-grid-row-select-all`, `data-grid-row-select-checkbox`, `data-grid-row-select-indicator`, `data-grid-row-spacer`, `data-grid-scroll-area`, `data-grid-scrollbar`, `data-grid-table`, `data-grid-table-body`, `data-grid-table-body-cell`, `data-grid-table-body-cell-skeleton`, `data-grid-table-body-row`, `data-grid-table-body-row-expanded`, `data-grid-table-body-row-skeleton`, `data-grid-table-empty`, `data-grid-table-foot`, `data-grid-table-foot-cell`, `data-grid-table-foot-row`, `data-grid-table-head`, `data-grid-table-head-cell`, `data-grid-table-head-cell-resize`, `data-grid-table-head-row`, `data-grid-table-loader`, `data-grid-table-viewport`, `data-grid-thumb`, `data-grid-virtual-spacer-bottom`, `data-grid-virtual-spacer-top`, `data-grid-virtual-status-complete`, `data-grid-virtual-status-loading`, `scroll-area-content`, `scroll-area-viewport`

Heavy dependencies: `@tanstack/react-table`

### Description List

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/description-list";`

Semantic description list root (`<dl>`). Compose with DescriptionTerm and DescriptionDetails to build accessible key–value displays.

Exports: `DescriptionDetails`, `DescriptionDetailsProps`, `DescriptionList`, `DescriptionListProps`, `DescriptionTerm`, `DescriptionTermProps`, `descriptionListVariants`

Props (`DescriptionDetailsProps`):
Extends: `React.ComponentProps<"dd">`

Props (`DescriptionListProps`):
Extends: `React.ComponentProps<"dl">`, `DescriptionListVariantProps`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `divided` | `boolean` |  | `false` | Adds a subtle bottom border between rows (horizontal orientation only). |

Props (`DescriptionTermProps`):
Extends: `React.ComponentProps<"dt">`

Variants:
- `orientation`: `vertical`, `horizontal` (default: `vertical`)
- `size`: `sm`, `default`, `lg` (default: `default`)

Data slots: `description-details`, `description-list`, `description-term`

### Execution Trace Bar

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/execution-trace-bar";`

Horizontal stacked proportional bar that visualises time or value breakdown across labelled segments, with per-segment tooltips and an optional legend.

Exports: `ExecutionTraceBar`, `ExecutionTraceBarProps`, `TraceSegment`

Props (`ExecutionTraceBarProps`):

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `segments` | `TraceSegment[]` | yes |  | Ordered list of segments to display in the bar. |
| `total` | `number` |  |  | Denominator for percentage calculations. Defaults to the sum of all segment values. |
| `showLegend` | `boolean` |  | `true` | Whether to render the segment legend below the bar. |
| `formatValue` | `(n: number) => string` |  | `(n) => String(n)` | Formats a raw numeric value for display in tooltips and the legend. |
| `size` | `VariantProps<typeof executionTraceBarVariants>["size"]` |  | `"default"` | Controls the height of the stacked bar track. |
| `className` | `string` |  |  | Additional classes merged onto the outermost wrapper `div`. |

Variants:
- `size`: `sm`, `default`, `lg` (default: `default`)

Data slots: `execution-trace-bar`, `execution-trace-bar-legend`, `execution-trace-bar-segment`

### Filters

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/filters";`

A faceted filter builder modelled on corr.sh's Filters.

Exports: `CustomRendererProps`, `DEFAULT_I18N`, `DEFAULT_OPERATORS`, `Filter`, `FilterFieldConfig`, `FilterFieldGroup`, `FilterFieldType`, `FilterFieldsConfig`, `FilterGroup`, `FilterI18nConfig`, `FilterI18nOperators`, `FilterOperator`, `FilterOption`, `Filters`, `FiltersContent`, `FiltersContentProps`, `FiltersProps`, `createFilter`, `createFilterGroup`

Props (`CustomRendererProps`):

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `field` | `FilterFieldConfig` | yes |  | The FilterFieldConfig whose value is being edited. |
| `onChange` | `(values: string[]) => void` | yes |  | Callback to commit a new set of selected values for this filter. |
| `operator` | `string` | yes |  | The operator value currently applied to the filter chip. |
| `values` | `string[]` | yes |  | Currently selected values for this filter. |

Props (`FiltersContentProps`):

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `fields` | `FilterFieldsConfig` | yes |  | Field definitions (flat list or grouped) used to resolve chip labels. |
| `filters` | `Filter[]` | yes |  | Controlled list of active Filter chips to render. |
| `onChange` | `(filters: Filter[]) => void` | yes |  | Called with the updated filter list whenever a chip is changed or removed. |

Props (`FiltersProps`):

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `allowMultiple` | `boolean` |  | `true` | Allow the same field to be filtered more than once. |
| `className` | `string` |  |  | Extra classes merged onto the root container `<div>`. |
| `enableShortcut` | `boolean` |  | `false` | Bind a keyboard shortcut that opens the add-filter menu. |
| `fields` | `FilterFieldsConfig` | yes |  | Field definitions (flat list or grouped). |
| `filters` | `Filter[]` | yes |  | Controlled list of active filters. |
| `i18n` | `Partial< Omit< FilterI18nConfig, "operators" \| "placeholders" \| "helpers" \| "validation" > > & { operators?: Partial<FilterI18nOperators>; placeholders?: Partial<FilterI18nConfig["placeholders"]>; helpers?: Partial<FilterI18nConfig["helpers"]>; validation?: Partial<FilterI18nConfig["validation"]>; }` |  |  | Partial i18n overrides merged over DEFAULT_I18N. |
| `onChange` | `(filters: Filter[]) => void` | yes |  | Called whenever the filter list changes. |
| `radius` | `"default" \| "full"` |  | `"default"` | Chip corner style. |
| `shortcutKey` | `string` |  | `"f"` | Key for the shortcut. |
| `shortcutLabel` | `string` |  | `"F"` | Label shown in the trigger's `Kbd` hint. |
| `showSearchInput` | `boolean` |  | `true` | Show the search box at the top of the field picker. |
| `size` | `FilterSize` |  | `"default"` | Control density. |
| `trigger` | `React.ReactElement` |  |  | Replace the default "Add filter" trigger element. |
| `variant` | `"solid" \| "default"` |  | `"default"` | Reserved spacing style. |

Variants:
- `variant`: `solid`, `default` (default: `default`)
- `size`: `sm`, `default`, `lg` (default: `default`)

Data slots: `filter`, `filter-add`, `filter-chip`, `filter-operator`, `filter-remove`, `filter-value`

### Item

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/item";`

Flexible row-level container for list entries, menu rows, or card-like tiles in an ItemGroup.

Exports: `Item`, `ItemActions`, `ItemContent`, `ItemDescription`, `ItemFooter`, `ItemGroup`, `ItemHeader`, `ItemMedia`, `ItemProps`, `ItemSeparator`, `ItemTitle`

Props (`ItemProps`):
Extends: `useRender.ComponentProps<"div">`, `VariantProps<typeof itemVariants>`

Variants:
- `variant`: `default`, `outline`, `muted`, `ghost` (default: `default`)
- `size`: `default`, `sm`, `xs`, `xl` (default: `default`)
