### Number Input Percentage with Chevrons

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/number-input-percentage-with-chevrons";`

A percentage number input (0–100 %) with stacked up/down chevron buttons, formatted with React Aria's `NumberField`.

Exports: `NumberInputPercentageWithChevrons`, `NumberInputPercentageWithChevronsProps`

Props (`NumberInputPercentageWithChevronsProps`):
Extends: `Omit< React.ComponentProps<"input">, "value" | "onChange" | "defaultValue" | "size" >`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `defaultValue` | `number` |  | `0` | Initial percentage value (0–100) used when the input is uncontrolled. |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | `aria-label` base and `name` attribute forwarded to the inner `Input`. |
| `value` | `number` |  |  | Controlled percentage value (0–100); converted to 0–1 internally. |
| `onChange` | `(value: number) => void` |  |  | Called with the new integer percentage (0–100) on every change. |
| `disabled` | `boolean` |  |  | Disables the entire `NumberField` including the chevron buttons. |
| `label` | `string` |  |  | Accessible label text applied to the `NumberField` and inner `Input`. |
| `containerClassName` | `string` |  |  | Extra classes applied to the outer `Group` container element. |
| `size` | `VariantProps<typeof numberInputGroupVariants>["size"]` |  | `"default"` | Controls the height of the input group. Defaults to `"default"` (h-8). |

Variants:
- `size`: `sm`, `default`, `lg` (default: `default`)

Data slots: `chevrons-container`, `decrement-button`, `increment-button`, `input`, `input-group`, `number-input-percentage-with-chevrons`

### Number Input with Buttons

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/number-input-with-buttons";`

A stepper-style number input with flanking decrement (−) and increment (+) buttons rendered on the left and right edges.

Exports: `NumberInputWithButtons`, `NumberInputWithButtonsProps`

Props (`NumberInputWithButtonsProps`):
Extends: `Omit< React.ComponentProps<"input">, "value" | "onChange" | "defaultValue" | "size" >`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `defaultValue` | `number` |  |  | Uncontrolled initial value passed to the underlying `NumberField`. |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | `name` attribute of the hidden input; also used as the aria-label base. |
| `value` | `number` |  |  | Controlled value passed to the underlying `NumberField`. |
| `onChange` | `(value: number) => void` |  |  | Called with the new numeric value whenever it changes. |
| `min` | `number` |  |  | Minimum allowed value; forwarded to `NumberField` as `minValue`. |
| `max` | `number` |  |  | Maximum allowed value; forwarded to `NumberField` as `maxValue`. |
| `step` | `number` |  | `1` | Amount to increment/decrement per step. Defaults to `1`. |
| `disabled` | `boolean` |  |  | Disables the entire field when `true`. |
| `label` | `string` |  |  | Accessible label; used as `aria-label` on both the field and the input. |
| `className` | `string` |  |  | Extra classes merged onto the inner `<Input>` element. |
| `containerClassName` | `string` |  |  | Extra classes merged onto the `<Group>` wrapper element. |
| `size` | `VariantProps<typeof numberInputGroupVariants>["size"]` |  | `"default"` | Controls the height of the input group. Defaults to `"default"` (h-8). |

Variants:
- `size`: `sm`, `default`, `lg` (default: `default`)

Data slots: `decrement-button`, `increment-button`, `input`, `input-group`, `number-input-with-buttons`

### Number Input with Chevrons

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/number-input-with-chevrons";`

A number input with stacked up/down chevron buttons in a trailing column, supporting arbitrary `Intl.NumberFormatOptions` formatting.

Exports: `NumberInputWithChevrons`, `NumberInputWithChevronsProps`

Props (`NumberInputWithChevronsProps`):
Extends: `Omit< React.ComponentProps<"input">, "value" | "onChange" | "defaultValue" | "size" >`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `defaultValue` | `number` |  |  | Uncontrolled initial value passed to the underlying `NumberField`. |
| `name` | `string` | yes |  | `name` attribute of the hidden input; also used as the aria-label base. |
| `value` | `number` |  |  | Controlled value passed to the underlying `NumberField`. |
| `onChange` | `(value: number) => void` |  |  | Called with the new numeric value whenever it changes. |
| `min` | `number` |  |  | Minimum allowed value; forwarded to `NumberField` as `minValue`. |
| `max` | `number` |  |  | Maximum allowed value; forwarded to `NumberField` as `maxValue`. |
| `step` | `number` |  | `1` | Amount to increment/decrement per step. Defaults to `1`. |
| `disabled` | `boolean` |  |  | Disables the entire field when `true`. |
| `label` | `string` |  |  | Accessible label; used as `aria-label` on both the field and the input. |
| `formatOptions` | `Intl.NumberFormatOptions` |  |  | `Intl.NumberFormatOptions` forwarded to React Aria's formatter (e.g. `{ style: "currency", currency: "USD" }`). |
| `containerClassName` | `string` |  |  | Extra classes merged onto the `<Group>` wrapper element. |
| `size` | `VariantProps<typeof numberInputGroupVariants>["size"]` |  | `"default"` | Controls the height of the input group. Defaults to `"default"` (h-8). |

Variants:
- `size`: `sm`, `default`, `lg` (default: `default`)

Data slots: `chevrons-container`, `decrement-button`, `increment-button`, `input`, `input-group`, `number-input-with-chevrons`

### Password Input

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/password-input";`

A password field with an inline toggle button that reveals or masks the entered text.

Exports: `PasswordInput`, `PasswordInputProps`

Props (`PasswordInputProps`):
Extends: `Omit< React.ComponentProps<"input">, "type" | "size" >`, `Pick<InputProps, "size">`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `label` | `string` |  |  | Optional `<label>` text rendered above the input and linked via `htmlFor={props.id}`; requires `id` to be set. |
| `showPasswordLabel` | `string` |  | `"Show password"` | `aria-label` for the toggle button when password is currently visible; announcing the action to screen readers. |
| `hidePasswordLabel` | `string` |  | `"Hide password"` | `aria-label` for the toggle button when password is currently hidden; announcing the action to screen readers. |
| `containerClassName` | `string` |  |  | Additional classes merged onto the relative wrapper `<div>` that contains the input and the visibility-toggle button. |

Data slots: `input`, `input-container`, `label`, `password-input`, `visibility-toggle`

### Phone Input

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/phone-input";`

An international phone number field composed of a flag/country-code selector and a number text input that formats as the user types.

Exports: `PhoneInput`, `PhoneInputProps`, `PhoneInputVariant`

Props (`PhoneInputProps`):
Extends: `Omit< React.ComponentProps<"input">, "onChange" | "value" | "ref" | "size" >`, `Omit<React.ComponentProps<typeof RPNInput>, "onChange" | "size">`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `onChange` | `(value: Value) => void` |  |  | Called with the formatted E.164 phone number string as the user types; receives an empty string instead of `undefined` for partial inputs. |
| `onCountryChange` | `(country: Country) => void` |  |  | Called whenever the user selects a different country in the CountrySelect popover. |
| `variant` | `PhoneInputVariant` |  | `"default"` | Height of the field and country button — `"sm"` \| `"default"` \| `"lg"` (default `"default"`). |
| `popupClassName` | `string` |  |  | Extra classes merged onto the country-selector popover content. |

Data slots: `phone-input`

Heavy dependencies: `react-phone-number-input`

### Preview Card

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/preview-card";`

A hover-activated floating card that previews rich content for a trigger element, built on Base UI's `PreviewCard` primitives.

Exports: `PreviewCard`, `PreviewCardArrow`, `PreviewCardBackdrop`, `PreviewCardPopup`, `PreviewCardPortal`, `PreviewCardPositioner`, `PreviewCardProps`, `PreviewCardTrigger`

Props (`PreviewCardProps`):
Extends: `React.ComponentProps< typeof PreviewCardPrimitive.Root >`

Data slots: `preview-card`, `preview-card-arrow`, `preview-card-backdrop`, `preview-card-popup`, `preview-card-portal`, `preview-card-positioner`, `preview-card-trigger`

### Range Calendar With Presets

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/range-calendar-with-presets";`

A range calendar with a row of quick-select preset buttons and an optional apply/reset footer.

Exports: `RangeCalendarWithPresets`, `RangeCalendarWithPresetsProps`

Props (`RangeCalendarWithPresetsProps`):

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `selected` | `DateRange` |  |  | The selected date range. |
| `_defaultRange` | `DateRange` |  |  | The default date range. |
| `onSelect` | `(range: DateRange \| undefined) => void` |  |  | Callback fired when the date range changes. |
| `className` | `string` |  |  | The class name for the root element. |
| `presets` | `RangePreset[]` |  |  | Custom presets to show in the sidebar. If not provided, default presets will be used. |
| `disableFutureDates` | `boolean` |  |  | Whether to disable future dates. |
| `onApply` | `() => void` |  |  | Callback fired when the apply button is clicked. |
| `onReset` | `() => void` |  |  | Callback fired when the reset button is clicked. |
| `showFooter` | `boolean` |  | `false` | Whether to show the apply and reset buttons. |
| `numberOfMonths` | `number` |  | `2` | The number of months to display in the calendar. |
| `showOutsideDays` | `boolean` |  | `true` | Whether to show outside days in the calendar. |

Data slots: `range-calendar-with-presets`

Heavy dependencies: `react-day-picker`

### Select With Search

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/select-with-search";`

A searchable single-select dropdown that virtualizes its option list for large datasets and supports server-side pagination.

Exports: `SelectOption`, `SelectWithSearch`, `SelectWithSearchProps`

Props (`SelectWithSearchProps`):

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `options` | `SelectOption[]` | yes |  | List of options to render in the virtualized dropdown list. |
| `value` | `string` |  |  | Currently selected value; drives controlled mode. |
| `onValueChange` | `(value: string) => void` |  |  | Called with the new value when the user selects an option. |
| `placeholder` | `string` |  | `"Select an option"` | Text shown in the trigger button when no option is selected. |
| `label` | `string` |  |  | Accessible label rendered above the trigger via Label. |
| `searchPlaceholder` | `string` |  | `"Search..."` | Placeholder inside the search CommandInput. |
| `noResultsText` | `string` |  | `"No results found."` | Message shown by CommandEmpty when the option list is empty. |
| `className` | `string` |  |  | Additional classes merged onto the outermost wrapper `div`. |
| `disabled` | `boolean` |  | `false` | When `true`, the trigger button is disabled and non-interactive. |
| `error` | `boolean` |  | `false` | When `true`, renders the trigger border in `destructive` color. |
| `required` | `boolean` |  | `false` | When `true`, appends a red asterisk to the label. |
| `name` | `string` |  |  | Native `name` attribute forwarded to the trigger button element. |
| `onSearchChange` | `(search: string) => void` |  |  | Called with the current search string on every keystroke. |
| `id` | `string` |  |  | `id` forwarded to the trigger button; falls back to `name`. |
| `onOpenChange` | `(open: boolean) => void` |  |  | Called with the new open state whenever the popover opens or closes. |
| `onEndReached` | `() => void` |  |  | Called by `Virtuoso` when the user scrolls to the bottom of the list. |
| `renderOption` | `(option: SelectOption, selected: boolean) => React.ReactNode` |  |  | Custom renderer for each option row; receives the option and selection state. |
| `renderSelectedOption` | `(option: SelectOption) => React.ReactNode` |  |  | Custom renderer for the selected value shown inside the trigger button. |
| `renderLoading` | `() => React.ReactNode` |  |  | Renders a loading indicator used both for initial load and next-page fetches. |
| `renderEmpty` | `() => React.ReactNode` |  |  | Renders empty-state content when `options` is empty and not loading. |
| `loading` | `boolean` |  | `false` | When `true`, shows `renderLoading` instead of the option list. |
| `fetchingNextPage` | `boolean` |  | `false` | When `true`, appends the `renderLoading` footer below the virtualized list. |
| `size` | `"default" \| "sm" \| "lg" \| "icon"` |  | `"default"` | Controls the size variant passed to the trigger Button. |

Data slots: `select-with-search`

### Select With Search And Button

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/select-with-search-and-button";`

A searchable single-select dropdown with a persistent action button pinned below the option list, typically used for inline "Add new …" creation flows.

Exports: `SelectOptionWithSearchAndButton`, `SelectWithSearchAndButton`, `SelectWithSearchAndButtonProps`

Props (`SelectWithSearchAndButtonProps`):

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `options` | `SelectOptionWithSearchAndButton[]` | yes |  | List of options to display in the searchable dropdown. |
| `value` | `string` |  |  | Currently selected value; drives controlled mode. |
| `onValueChange` | `(value: string) => void` |  |  | Called with the new value when the user selects or deselects an option. |
| `placeholder` | `string` |  | `"Select an option"` | Text shown in the trigger button when no option is selected. |
| `label` | `string` |  |  | Accessible label rendered above the trigger via Label. |
| `searchPlaceholder` | `string` |  | `"Search..."` | Placeholder inside the search CommandInput. |
| `noResultsText` | `string` |  | `"No results found."` | Message shown by CommandEmpty when no options match the search. |
| `className` | `string` |  |  | Additional classes merged onto the outermost wrapper `div`. |
| `disabled` | `boolean` |  | `false` | When `true`, the trigger button is disabled and non-interactive. |
| `error` | `boolean` |  | `false` | When `true`, renders the trigger border in `destructive` color. |
| `required` | `boolean` |  | `false` | When `true`, appends a red asterisk to the label. |
| `name` | `string` |  |  | `name` / `id` forwarded to the trigger button element. |
| `buttonText` | `string` |  | `"Add new"` | Label text rendered inside the action button below the option list. |
| `onButtonClick` | `() => void` |  |  | Called when the user clicks the action button; also closes the dropdown. |
| `buttonIcon` | `React.ReactNode` |  | `(
    <HugeiconsIcon
      aria-hidden="true"
      className="-ms-2 me-2 size-4 opacity-60"
      icon={Add01Icon}
    />
  )` | Icon node rendered to the left of `buttonText` inside the action button. |

Data slots: `select-with-search-and-button`

## Uncategorized

### Chart

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/chart";`

Root wrapper for the data-driven chart components.

Exports: `BaseChartProps`, `CHART_COLORS`, `CartesianGrid`, `Chart`, `ChartColorKeys`, `ChartConfig`, `ChartContainer`, `ChartDatum`, `ChartLayout`, `ChartLegend`, `ChartLegendContent`, `ChartLegendContentProps`, `ChartLegendProps`, `ChartSeriesSelector`, `ChartSeriesSelectorProps`, `ChartStyle`, `ChartTooltip`, `ChartTooltipContent`, `ChartTooltipProps`, `ChartType`, `DEFAULT_COLORS`, `IntervalType`, `XAxis`, `XAxisProps`, `YAxis`, `constructCategoryColors`, `getColorValue`, `getPayloadConfigFromPayload`, `useChart`, `valueToPercent`

Props (`BaseChartProps`):
Extends: `React.ComponentProps<"div">`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `cartesianGridProps` | `CartesianGridProps` |  |  | Props forwarded to the recharts `CartesianGrid` element. |
| `colors` | `readonly ChartColorKeys[]` |  |  | Ordered palette; cycles when shorter than the number of series. |
| `config` | `ChartConfig` | yes |  | Per-series ChartConfig; series are derived from its keys. |
| `containerHeight` | `number` |  |  | Pixel height of the chart canvas. Defaults to 200 (mobile) / 370. |
| `data` | `ChartDatum[]` | yes |  | Array of data rows. |
| `dataKey` | `string` | yes |  | Field used for the category axis labels. |
| `defaultSelectedSeries` | `string \| null` |  |  | Uncontrolled initial selected series. Defaults to `null`. |
| `displayEdgeLabelsOnly` | `boolean` |  |  | Render only the first and last X-axis labels. |
| `intervalType` | `IntervalType` |  |  | Axis tick interval strategy. |
| `layout` | `ChartLayout` |  |  | Chart orientation — see ChartLayout. |
| `legend` | `LegendContentType \| boolean` |  |  | `true` for the default interactive legend, or custom recharts content. |
| `legendProps` | `Omit< React.ComponentProps<typeof LegendPrimitive>, "content" \| "ref" >` |  |  | Extra props forwarded to the recharts `Legend` element. |
| `onSelectedSeriesChange` | `(value: string \| null) => void` |  |  | Fires when the selection changes (legend click, bar click, or selector). |
| `selectedSeries` | `string \| null` |  |  | Controlled selected series (the isolated/highlighted one, or `null`). Share this with a ChartSeriesSelector `value` so a header selector and the in-chart interactive legend stay in sync. |
| `showGridLines` | `boolean` |  |  | Shows the CartesianGrid when `true`. |
| `showXAxis` | `boolean` |  |  | Shows the XAxis when `true`. |
| `showYAxis` | `boolean` |  |  | Shows the YAxis when `true`. |
| `tooltip` | `TooltipContentType<ValueType, NameType> \| boolean` |  |  | `true` for the default styled tooltip, or a custom recharts content. |
| `tooltipProps` | `Omit<TooltipProps, "content"> & { showLabel?: boolean; labelSeparator?: boolean; showIndicator?: boolean; indicator?: "line" \| "dot" \| "dashed"; nameKey?: string; labelKey?: string; }` |  |  | Extra props forwarded to the recharts `Tooltip` element. |
| `type` | `ChartType` |  |  | Stacking behaviour — see ChartType. |
| `valueFormatter` | `(value: number) => string` |  |  | Formats numeric value-axis ticks and tooltip values. |
| `xAxisProps` | `XAxisPrimitiveProps` |  |  | Extra props forwarded to the recharts `XAxis` element. |
| `yAxisProps` | `YAxisPrimitiveProps` |  |  | Extra props forwarded to the recharts `YAxis` element. |

Props (`ChartLegendContentProps`):
Extends: `React.ComponentProps<"div">`, `Pick<LegendProps, "align" | "verticalAlign">`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `payload` | `readonly LegendPayload[]` |  |  | Recharts legend payload injected automatically by the `Legend` wrapper. |
| `showIcon` | `boolean` |  | `true` | When `true`, shows the color icon/dot for each legend entry. |
| `nameKey` | `string` |  |  | Data key used to look up the series label in ChartConfig. |

Props (`ChartLegendProps`):
Extends: `Omit< React.ComponentProps<typeof LegendPrimitive>, "ref" >`

Props (`ChartSeriesSelectorProps`):
Extends: `Omit<React.ComponentProps<"div">, "onChange" | "defaultValue">`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `allowDeselect` | `boolean` |  | `true` | Clicking the active series clears the selection. Defaults to `true`. |
| `colors` | `readonly ChartColorKeys[]` |  | `DEFAULT_COLORS` | Palette for the color dots; cycles when shorter than the series count. |
| `config` | `ChartConfig` | yes |  | Per-series ChartConfig; one toggle is rendered per key. |
| `data` | `ChartDatum[]` |  |  | Data rows used to compute each series' total when `showTotal`. |
| `defaultValue` | `string \| null` |  | `null` | Uncontrolled initial selection. Defaults to `null`. |
| `onValueChange` | `(value: string \| null) => void` |  |  | Fires with the new selection (or `null` when cleared). |
| `series` | `string[]` |  |  | Restrict and order the rendered series. Defaults to `Object.keys(config)`. |
| `showTotal` | `boolean` |  | `false` | Render each series' summed total beneath its label (dashboard style). |
| `value` | `string \| null` |  |  | Controlled selected series key, or `null` for none. |
| `valueFormatter` | `(value: number) => string` |  | `defaultTotalFormatter` | Formats the per-series total. Defaults to `toLocaleString`. |

Props (`ChartTooltipProps`):
Extends: `TooltipProps<ValueType, NameType>`

Props (`XAxisProps`):
Extends: `Omit<XAxisPrimitiveProps, "ref">`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `displayEdgeLabelsOnly` | `boolean` |  |  | Render only the first and last tick labels, hiding all intermediate ones. |
| `intervalType` | `IntervalType` |  | `"preserveStartEnd"` | Recharts tick interval strategy forwarded to the `XAxis` primitive. |

Data slots: `chart`, `chart-series-selector`, `chart-series-selector-item`

Heavy dependencies: `recharts`

### direction

Import: `import { ... } from "@strait/ui/components/direction";`

Re-exports Base UI's direction utilities for setting and reading the text directionality (`"ltr"` | `"rtl"`) of the component tree.

Exports: `DirectionProvider`, `useDirection`
